title: Innovative Light Italian Egg Tiramisu
description: A creative twist on the classic Italian dessert, featuring free-range eggs and a touch of herbal flavor, made in a paella pan for a unique presentation.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs and half of the granulated sugar until stiff peaks form.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the cooled coffee, herbal liqueur, and melted butter.
Dip each ladyfinger into the coffee mixture for about 3-5 seconds on each side, then arrange a layer of ladyfingers in the paella pan.
Spread half of the egg mixture over the ladyfingers, followed by a sprinkle of sea salt and a dusting of cocoa powder.
Repeat the layers, starting with the ladyfingers, then the remaining egg mixture, and finally another sprinkle of sea salt and dusting of cocoa powder.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the edges are set and the center is just slightly jiggly.
Remove from the oven and let cool to room temperature before refrigerating for at least 3 hours.
Just before serving, dust the top with the remaining granulated sugar and slice into wedges.
